resize: none } .xterm .composition-view { background: #000; color: #fff; display: none; position: absolute; white-space: nowrap; z-index: 1 } .xterm .composition-view.active { display: block } .xterm .xterm-viewport { background-color: #000; overflow-y: scroll; cursor: default; position: absolute; right: 0; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0 } .xterm .xterm-screen { position: relative } .xterm .xterm-screen canvas { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0 } .xterm .xterm-scroll-area { visibility: hidden } .xterm-char-measure-element { display: inline-block;
